description: Show or replace the per-subagent scratchpad. The `update` field is optional because the same tool serves two behaviors: omit `update` (or leave it unset) to read the current scratchpad text without changing it; provide `update` as a string to replace the stored scratchpad for this subagent session.

update.description: When set, replaces the entire scratchpad with this string. When omitted, the tool does not write and instead returns whatever is already stored (or a default empty-state message).
